title: Israeli attacks kill 28 people in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire — 'Black Wednesday'
snippet: 28 killed in southern Lebanon on Day 14 of ceasefire extension — deadliest day since extension began. Victims include 2 Lebanese army soldiers, 3 paramedics, and members of two families. Hezbollah drone strike on Israeli position in Yarine. Over 70 injured including children. Dubbed 'Black Wednesday.' Cumulative: 2,500+ killed, 1.2M displaced since March.
tag_reason: 28 killed = deadliest day since ceasefire extension; 'Black Wednesday' designation; Lebanese army soldiers killed for first time
